name: getImage
description: Generate exactly ONE image from a text prompt. Do NOT call this more than once for a single request — use n>1 if multiple variants are needed. Prompts are automatically enhanced for quality unless strictPrompt=true. Never change the configured model unless explicitly instructed. After a successful call, include the returned image URL in your final answer as a Discord-supported masked link in the form `[short image description](url)`, for example `[Mann mit Hut](https://...)`. Prefer this masked-link format over a bare http(s) URL. Do not omit the URL.
policyHint: When a scene, character, location, or item comes up in conversation and no image has been shown for it yet in the current exchange, call this tool to generate a fitting illustration. If the tool returns an image URL, include that exact URL in the final answer behind a concise descriptive Discord masked link like `[Mann mit Hut](url)`, not as a bare standalone http(s) URL unless masking is impossible.

prompt.description: Short, clean scene description (no on-image text).

size.description: Explicit size 'WxH' (e.g., 1152x896). If omitted, derived from 'aspect' and 'targetLongEdge'.

targetLongEdge.description: If 'size' is omitted, long edge target in pixels (default 1024).

n.description: Number of images to generate (subject to model limits).

strictPrompt.description: If true, sends the prompt exactly as given with no enhancement.

negative.description: Extra negative terms to avoid in the image.

enhancerEndpoint.description: Chat/completions endpoint for the prompt enhancer (overrides toolsconfig).

enhancerApiKey.description: API key for the prompt enhancer (overrides toolsconfig).

enhancerModel.description: Model for the prompt enhancer (overrides toolsconfig).

enhancerTemperature.description: Temperature for the prompt enhancer (overrides toolsconfig).

enhancerMaxTokens.description: Max tokens for the prompt enhancer (overrides toolsconfig).

preferDigitalPainting.description: Prefer a digital painting style (default: true).
